project.name: Visibility Fixture
project.description: Jawata-owned fixture for Sprint 22a P1-a.2 (change_visibility): a Widget with a public called method (reduce to package), a package-private called method (widen to public), and an uncalled public method (reduce to private), plus a same-package User call site. JRE-only, compiles clean before and after each in-package visibility change.
